query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, awayML, homeML, awaySpread, homeSpread, total FROM games WHERE (awayTeam LIKE '%NYY%') AND (homeTeam LIKE '%SF%') AND sport = 'MLB' ORDER BY gameDate ASC LIMIT 5;
